sn1.12:1.0.1: At Sāvatthī. Standing to one side, that devata recited this verse in the presence of the Blessed One:
sn1.12:1.0.2: v.22"One who has sons delights in sons,One with cattle delights in cattle.Acquisitions truly are a man's delight;Without acquisitions one does not delight."
sn1.12:1.0.3: v.23"One who has sons sorrows over sons,One with cattle sorrows over cattle.Acquisitions truly are a man's sorrows;Without acquisitions one does not sorrow."
